description: Event venues discovered in Väse, Vålberg, and Deje areas (Värmland, Sweden)

venues.name: Kulturhuset i Deje
venues.description: Combined cultural center with library, Deje Folkets husförening, music hall, youth center Hubben, and Deje församlingshem. Hosts events including cinema nights, parties, conferences, and other events.

venues.name: Deje Folkets husförening
venues.description: Organizes cinema nights, parties, conferences and other events at Kulturhuset in Deje. Responsible for bookings.

venues.name: Dejefors Musikkår
venues.description: Music band formed in 1924, practices regularly at Kulturhuset in Deje. About 30 musicians from Klarälvsdalen.

venues.name: Hubben Deje
venues.description: Youth meeting place in the basement of Kulturhuset. Offers theme evenings and other activities for youth.

venues.name: Älvenäs Bygdegårdsförening
venues.description: Village hall in Vålberg available for rent for events and gatherings.

venues.name: Sosen Restaurang, Bar o. Pizzeria
venues.description: Restaurant, bar and pizzeria in Vålberg.

venues.name: Väse-Bäckelids Bygdegård
venues.description: Village hall in Väse. Website vasebygd.se is currently not accessible.

venues.name: Rävens Bistro
venues.description: Restaurant offering pizza and à la carte, as well as alcohol service. Some evenings open until 01:00.

venues.name: Rasta Värmland
venues.address: E18, Väse (between Stockholm and Oslo, 22 km east of Karlstad)
venues.description: Restaurant with outdoor seating and OKQ8 service station. Located at E18 highway.

venues.name: Equmeniakyrkan Väse
venues.description: Church in Väse with regular services and events. Also hosts activities like confirmations and gatherings.

notes: These are small localities in Värmland, Sweden, near Karlstad
Deje is part of Forshaga municipality
Väse and Vålberg are part of Karlstad municipality
Most venues are community halls, village halls (bygdegårdar), folkets hus, or small restaurants/pubs
The old Folkets hus in Vålberg has been reported as abandoned/closed in recent news
